name: Slidev Presentations
description: Create and present web-based slides for developers using Markdown, Vue components, code highlighting, animations, and interactive features.
author: Anthony Fu

name: Frontend Design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
author: Anthropic

name: Video Call
description: Join Google Meet calls as a video avatar with real-time voice conversation and vision. Activate when user shares a meet.google.com link.
author: Triangle Int
